This is a list of all weapons useable by the Controller.
{| class="sortable fandom-table"
|+Weapons (Useable by Controller)
!
!Weapon
!Weapon Type
!Cost
!Weight
!Required Tech Level
!Other Requirements
!Shield Damage
!Armor Piercing
!Energy Drain
!Damage Radius
!Accuracy
!Shots Per Turn
!Energy Per Shot
!Max Targets Per Turn
!Offensive Merit
|-
|[[File:Stunlaser.jpg|50x50px|link=Stun Laser]]
|[[Stun Laser]]
|Laser
|found
|5
|0
|none
|20
|10
|20
|1
|75
|1
|5
|
|2700
|-
|[[File:Argonlaser.jpg|50x50px|link=Argon Laser]]
|[[Argon Laser]]
|Laser
|4125 credits
|3
|0
|none
|50
|30
|0
|1
|85
|1.0
|20
|3
|4950
|-
|[[File:Syphon1.jpg|50x50px|link=EM Syphon]]
|[[EM Syphon]]
|Power Disruptor
|7500 credits
|5
|8
|none
|0
|0
|200
|1
|80
|1.0
|50
|1
|9000
|-
|[[File:Baronlaser.jpg|50x50px|link=Baron Laser]]
|[[Baron Laser]]
|Laser
|8250 credits
|6
|10
|none
|100
|60
|0
|1
|80
|1.0
|40
|3
|9900
|-
|[[File:Thornmines.jpg|50x50px|link=Thorn Mines]]
|[[Thorn Mines]]
|Mines
|8437 credits
|5
|11
|none
|10
|10
|0
|4
|25
|3.0
|2
|4
|10125
|-
|[[File:20mmautocannon.jpg|50x50px|link=20mm Auto Cannon]]
|[[20mm Auto Cannon]]
|Light Armor Piercing
|9450 credits
|6
|14
|none
|5
|40
|0
|1
|80
|3.0
|4
|1
|11340
|-
|[[File:Shielddisruptor.jpg|50x50px|link=Shield Disruptor]]
|[[Shield Disruptor]]
|Shield Disruptor
|9375 credits
|5
|14
|none
|250
|0
|0
|1
|80
|1.0
|20
|1
|11250
|-
|[[File:Avenger.jpg|50x50px|link=Avenger]]
|[[Avenger]]
|Cannon
|12187 credits
|15
|22
|none
|25
|350
|0
|1
|70
|0.45
|50
|1
|14625
|-
|[[File:Lr100rocketpack.jpg|50x50px|link=LR100 Rocket Pack]]
|[[LR100 Rocket Pack]]
|Rocket Pack
|12937 credits
|25
|24
|none
|50
|90
|0
|2
|70
|1.0
|20
|3
|15525
|-
|[[File:Syphonmkii.jpg|50x50px|link=Syphon MKII]]
|[[Syphon MKII]]
|Power Disruptor
|15000 credits
|10
|31
|none
|0
|0
|400
|1
|75
|1.0
|100
|1
|18000
|-
|[[File:Argon quad.jpg|50x50px|link=Quad Argon Lasers]]
|[[Quad Argon Lasers]]
|Laser
|16500 credits
|15
|35
|none
|200
|120
|0
|1
|70
|1.0
|80
|3
|19800
|-
|[[File:G33.jpg|50x50px|link=G33 Launcher]]
|[[G33 Launcher]]
|Magnetic Pulse
|16800 credits
|8
|36
|none
|75
|0
|150
|3
|50
|1.0
|25
|1
|20160
|-
|[[File:Heavyshielddisruptor.jpg|50x50px|link=Heavy Shield Disruptor]]
|[[Heavy Shield Disruptor]]
|Shield Disruptor
|18750 credits
|10
|42
|none
|500
|0
|0
|1
|75
|1.0
|40
|1
|22500
|-
|[[File:20mmmanifold.jpg|50x50px|link=20mm Manifold]]
|[[20mm Manifold]]
|Light Armor Piercing
|18900 credits
|12
|42
|none
|5
|40
|0
|1
|75
|6.0
|4
|10
|22680
|-
|[[File:Punisher.jpg|50x50px|link=Punisher]]
|[[Punisher]]
|Mortar
|18750 credits
|40
|42
|none
|300
|100
|0
|3
|50
|0.5
|150
|1
|22500
|-
|[[File:Syphonelite.jpg|50x50px|link=Syphon Elite]]

|Power Disruptor
|22500 credits
|20
|53
|none
|0
|0
|600
|1
|70
|1.0
|150
|1
|27000
|-

|Mines

|20

|0
|4

|3.0
|6
|4
|29025

|50

|0
|1
|75
|0.4
|100
|1
|29700

|100
|180
|0
|2
|65
|1.0
|40
|3
|31050

|0
|1
|70
|1.0
|70
|1
|33750

|10
|34560

|800

|1.0
|200
|1
|36000

|160
|3
|38700

|400

|1
|70
|1.0
|160
|1
|39600

|3

|75
|1
|40500

|0
|2

|1.0
|50
|2
|43875

|43875

|200
|1

|56250

|4

|200
|1
|89100

|1

|1.0
|160
|3
|124200

|0

|8
|10
|129600

|3500
|250
|0
|2
|25
|0.5
|400
|3
|135000
|-

|Multi-Launch Rocket Pack
|147637 credits
|250
|428
|[[Storm Weapon Technology]]
|250
|2500
|0
|2
|25
|0.5
|350
|1
|177165
|-

|150
|1
|185895
|-
|[[File:Thermaldawn.jpg|50x50px|link=Thermal Dawn]]

|Superweapon
|500 accolades
|100
|182
|none
|1000
|500
|0
|4
|100
|0.35
|400
|
|78705
|-

|200

|1500
|750
|0
|4
|100
|0.35
|600
|
|118080
|-

|379

|2000

|0
|4
|100
|0.35
|800
|
|157455
|-

|4
|100

|650
|
|275580

|Special Weapon
|found
|75
|31
|none
|75
|30
|0
|1
|65
|3
|20
|
|18090
|-

|[[Heavy Radial Laser]]
|Special Weapon
|found
|100
|76
|none
|75
|30
|0
|1
|65
|6
|20
|
|36180
|-
|[[File:Rayden.jpg|50x50px|link=Rayden]]
|[[Rayden]]
|Special Weapon
|10000 accolades;
found
|200
|305
|none;
[[Union of Service]]
|0
|0
|3250
|4
|100
|0.35
|500
|
|127935
|-
|[[File:Clusterbombs.jpg|50x50px|link=Cluster Bombs]]

|Clusterbomb
|250 mirons
|1000
|850
|none
|3500
|500
|750
|6
|?
|0.15
|1500
|
|200000
|-
|[[File:Pulserockets.jpg|50x50px|link=Pulse Rockets]]
|[[Pulse Rockets]]
|Multi-Launch Rocket Pack
|300 mirons
|400
|450
|none
|1500
|500
|800
|2
|?
|0.3
|1000
|3
|200000
|-
|[[File:Peacemakercannon.jpg|50x50px|link=Peace Maker Cannon]]
|[[Peace Maker Cannon]]
|Special Weapon
|quest reward
|350
|1000
|none
|4750
|2000
|0
|5
|100
|0.25
|1000
|
|550000
|-
|[[File:Pmcgold.jpg|50x50px|link=Peace Maker Cannon (Special Edition)]]
|[[Peace Maker Cannon (Special Edition)]]
|Special Weapon
|quest reward
|350
|1000
|none
|4950
|2025
|0
|5
|100
|0.25
|950
|1
|550000
|}
